subcodes.first_line: O how glorious is this supreme abasement which hath touched me once again in the love of God! By God, it is the most beloved unto me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبذا هذه الذله الکبری التی مستنی فی حب الله مره اخری تالله انها لا حب عندی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
